arts.ttl: Second Real Madrid star ruled out of Barcelona game following Borussia Dortmund comeback
arts.sum: Real Madrid manager Carlo Ancelotti has a wave of euphoria to ride into El Clasico after an inspired second half comeback against Borussia Dortmund, but it has come at a price. After Rodrygo Goes limped off with a hamstring tear, Thibaut Courtois is also set to miss their Saturday night date with Barcelona. The Belgian […] The post Second Real Madrid star ruled out of Barcelona game following Borussia Dortmund comeback appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Arsenal have edge over Barcelona in race for potential €90million attacker transfer
arts.sum: Arsenal may reportedly have the edge over Barcelona in the potential transfer race for Aston Villa’s in-form young striker Jhon Duran. The Colombia international only recently signed a new contract at Villa Park, but his superb form on the pitch perhaps unsurprisingly means that speculation over his future is not about to quieten down. Arsenal […] The post Arsenal have edge over Barcelona in race for potential €90million attacker transfer appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Xavi requests €100m Barcelona star as Manchester United signing if he replaces Ten Hag
arts.sum: Former Barcelona manager Xavi has reportedly requested the potential transfer of Brazilian winger Raphinha from his old club if he is to replace Erik ten Hag as Manchester United manager. The 27-year-old has been a star player for Barca so far this season, producing some of his best football since moving to the Nou Camp, […] The post Xavi requests €100m Barcelona star as Manchester United signing if he replaces Ten Hag appeared first on CaughtOffside.

Barcelona manager Hansi Flick reserves special praise for Marc Casadó and Bayern Munich's Vincent Kompany - Football España This time it was Vincent Kompany and midfielder Joshua Kimmich who spoke with the media in the run up to the big match at the Estadi Olímpic Lluís Companys on Wednesday, when Barça and Bayern Munich meet to fulfil the matchday three fixture of European football's premier club competition.

arts.ttl: Barcelona star hits out at Nico Williams ‘DISRESPECT’
arts.sum: Barcelona star Raphinha has hit out at the ‘disrespect’ he suffered during the summer transfer window, when images of his No.11 shirt were posted with Nico Williams ’ name on it. Raphinha has captained Barcelona on a semi-regular basis in the early part of the season, despite rumours over the summer that the Catalan side were doing everything in their power to attract the Athletic Bilbao star to the club.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Vincent Kompany admires these two FC Barcelona players
arts.sum: Bayern Munich coach Vincent Kompany can scope the FC Barcelona roster and see many he likes. “It’s special for Barcelona that they have (Yamal) who could potentially replace a player like Messi so soon after his departure.

arts.ttl: When is Barcelona - Bayern Munich? how to watch on TV, stream online
arts.sum: The game between Barcelona - Bayern Munich will be played on Wednesday October 23, with kick off at 3:00 p.m. ET / 12:00 p.m. PT . Bayern Munich has also been performing well, but they will be missing the services of their young midfielder Aleksandar Pavlovic due to a shoulder injury.

arts.ttl: Vincent Kompany hails 'exceptional' Barcelona for finding their Lionel Messi replacement so quickly
arts.sum: Vincent Kompany has heaped praise on Barcelona's Spanish forward Lamine Yamal, hailing the wonderkid as the club's natural heir to Lionel Messi.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid injury news: Los Blancos star set to miss El Clasico due to thigh problem
arts.sum: Real Madrid will reportedly be without the services of Rodrygo for Saturday's La Liga game against Barcelona due to a thigh problem.

arts.ttl: Slavko Vinčić will referee Bayern Munich’s Champions League showdown against FC Barcelona
arts.sum: As is the case for most of Bayern Munich ’s Champions League games, the club almost always gets dodgy referees (mostly English) during huge matchups in the quest to win Ol’ Big Ears. In the current campaign, the Bavarians have one win (9-2 vs Dinamo Zagreb) and one loss (1-0 to Aston Villa ) so far and sit 15 th on the 32-team table.
